title: UK internal market: data strategy update and research priorities
body: "The OIM published a Data Strategy Roadmap in 2023 to set out the evidence base for monitoring the effective operation of the UK internal market.  This update reports developments in relation to the evidence base, including ongoing work on intra-UK trade data, and also includes a list of research topics for further work. We are keen to understand how to take these forward in collaboration with the data community.  The OIM continues to work with the Office for National Statistics, UK Government departments, the Devolved Governments and other partners to improve our understanding of how the UK internal market is operating. "
